title: Update application name to Mannosalva Clinic App

requirements.summary: Update the application title in frontend/index.html to display 'Mannosalva Clinic App' in the browser tab
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab displays 'Mannosalva Clinic App' as the page title
The title tag in index.html reflects the new application name

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag content to 'Mannosalva Clinic App' to change the browser tab title

requirements.summary: Update the application branding in Layout.tsx header to display 'Mannosalva Clinic App' as the main application name
acceptanceCriteria: The header navigation displays 'Mannosalva Clinic App' prominently
The branding is visible on all pages that use the Layout component

file_operations.description: Update the header navigation branding text to display 'Mannosalva Clinic App' as the main application name, ensuring it appears prominently in the navigation header

requirements.summary: Update the login page branding in LoginPage.tsx to show 'Mannosalva Clinic App' as the application name
acceptanceCriteria: The login page displays 'Mannosalva Clinic App' in the branded card
The application name is clearly visible before authentication

file_operations.description: Update the branding text in the login card to display 'Mannosalva Clinic App', ensuring the application name is visible to users before authentication

requirements.summary: Update the footer branding in Layout.tsx to reference 'Mannosalva Clinic App' consistently
acceptanceCriteria: The footer displays 'Mannosalva Clinic App' in the branding section
The application name is consistent across all footer instances

file_operations.description: Update the footer branding text to display 'Mannosalva Clinic App', ensuring consistent application naming in the footer section across all pages
